---
title: "Board"
---

Officer roles and history are published on the [ISBA EnviBayes section page](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/).

## Current officers

| Role | Holder |
|------|--------|
| Section Chair (2026) | Andrew Zammit-Mangion, University of New South Wales |
| Section Chair-Elect (2027) | David Bolin, KAUST |
| Program Chair (2025–2026) | Andee Kaplan, Colorado State University |
| Secretary (2025–2026) | Eleni Matechou, Queen Mary University of London |
| Treasurer (2026) | Whitney Huang, Clemson University |

## Past officers

A **Past Officers** list is maintained on the [official section page](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/).

## Section dues

Annual, three-year, and lifetime dues are listed under **DUES** on the [same page](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/).
